script:
RT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv)
TOK=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' \
  -d 'client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e' \
  -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' \
  -d "refresh_token=$RT" \
  -d 'scope=TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.All offline_access' \
  | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
CODE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/h -w '%{http_code}' -X POST 'https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/0e06a27c-11e0-442a-b6a7-10bedc7e4364/teamwork/installedApps' \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOK" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"teamsApp@odata.bind":"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/922fe8e1-c937-4d74-a73f-66fcfc26da10"}')
echo "install=$CODE"
head -c 300 /tmp/h
echo
